title: Improved Movement
description: Improves movement through three features: snap tap, sub-tick input buffering and packet optimization. All toggleable via /bm FEATURE with a .json config.
body:
**Note: If you have my Essential PVP Utilities mod, please use /cStrafe to disable that feature.**

A client-side Fabric mod that enhances movement through snap tap _[WASD cancelling]_, sub-tick input buffering _[Still WIP]_, and small packet optimization _[faster position updates on strafe direction changes, also WIP]_.

These features are toggleable via _/bm_, it also contains a _[WIP]_ .json config file.
